fixes_applied.fix: Added import for ZenModeManager, @property zenModeButton, button click wiring in start()/onDestroy(), and _onZenMode() handler that calls consumeSlot() + enterZenMode() then loads GameScene. Also exposed public onZenModeButtonClick() alias for Inspector button binding.

Added imports for NarrativeManager and NPCDialog. Added @property npcDialog. In onLoad(), registered 'narrativeTrigger' listener on areaRestorationEffect.node that: (a) shows first NPC line via npcDialog.showLine(), (b) unlocks all area_restore DiaryFragments for the chapter via NarrativeManager.unlockFragment(). Registered cleanup in onDestroy().

ShopScene — IAP_SKUS catalog corrected with glowstone values
